personal.name: Keertana P K
personal.title: Electronics Engineering Student | Data Analytics Enthusiast
personal.tagline: Turning data and engineering ideas into impactful real-world solutions.
personal.bio: Final-year Electronics Engineering student at Ramaiah Institute of Technology with strong interests in data analytics, intelligent systems, and applied engineering. Passionate about solving real-world problems through data-driven insights and practical implementations.
personal.currentRoleDescription: Focused on data analytics, machine learning fundamentals, and real-time systems through academic projects and hands-on implementation.

about.title: About
sections: I am a final-year Electronics Engineering student with a strong interest in data analytics and intelligent systems.
My work focuses on combining engineering concepts with data-driven approaches to solve real-world problems.
I am actively seeking opportunities in data analytics and technology roles where I can learn, grow, and contribute.

experience.title: Intern – Design Thinking with AI
experience.description: Worked on solving real-world problems using design thinking and AI-powered low-code/no-code tools.

projects.title: Smart IoT Home Monitoring System
projects.description: Developed a system to monitor environmental parameters like temperature and humidity using IoT sensors.
projects.longDescription: Built a real-time monitoring system with dashboard visualization to track environmental data effectively.

projects.title: Real-Time Intrusion Detection System
projects.description: Machine learning system to detect malicious network traffic.
projects.longDescription: Built a model to classify network traffic and identify suspicious activity in IoT environments.

projects.title: Smartphone Market Data Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed smartphone datasets to extract pricing and trend insights.
projects.longDescription: Performed data cleaning, visualization, and regression analysis to generate insights.
